name: nejm-skills
description: An opinionated agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at The New England Journal of Medicine (NEJM), the flagship clinical-medicine journal.

plugins.name: nejm-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the NEJM clinical manuscript lifecycle: workflow router, clinical-significance fit, study design & trial registration, EQUATOR reporting guidelines, structured abstract, terse IMRAD writing, clinical statistics, clinical display items, clinical ethics & integrity, Vancouver/ICMJE references, submission preflight, and response to reviewers.
